justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted the initial time request and then adjusted to the user's revised preference without issue.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively offered an alternative time slot when the initial request was unavailable, which the user accepted.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently handled the booking process in three turns, accurately understanding and responding to each user input.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, leading to a successful booking without any friction points.
